title: Delicate American Stew
description: A comforting and flavorful stew made with tender chunks of beef and a hint of sweetness from prunes, all in a rich and savory broth.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the flour to the pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually add the red wine, prune juice (if using), and broth, whisking to combine.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the beef is tender, about 2-3 hours.
Stir in the prunes and cook for an additional 30 minutes.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs (optional).
